context: Evaluates the implementation of the 'Adaptive Testing' strategy, specifically checking for sociable unit tests, the use of hand-written fakes, and behavioral assertions instead of mocking frameworks.

checklist.name: Sociable testing via Public API
checklist.description: Tests the entire feature through its main public entry point (e.g., FirmwareDispatcher.dispatch()) rather than testing internal classes (like scanners, builders) individually.

checklist.name: Hand-written Fake usage
checklist.description: Uses at least one explicit hand-written 'Fake' class (e.g., FakeFirmwareRepository, InMemoryRepo) that maintains an internal list or state for verification.

checklist.name: No automated mocking
checklist.description: The test does NOT use 'jest.mock', 'sinon.stub', 'Mockito.mock', or any similar library to create or control mock objects.

checklist.name: State-based behavioral assertions
checklist.description: Assertions check the final state of the 'Fake' (e.g. check number of logs saved) or the result of the API call, rather than verifying calls to mocks.
